text: # Portfolio Knowledge Base

## Profile Overview
Name: Yassir Chergui
Title: Data Science & AI Engineer
Location: Meknes, Morocco
Status: Master's student in Data Science & AI (S4), seeking 4-6 month PFE internship.
Contact: cherguiyassir1@gmail.com | +212 693 534 651
Website: https://chergui-yassir.vercel.app
GitHub: https://github.com/YassirCher
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yassir-chergui-051331369

## Professional Summary
Yassir is an AI engineer focused on Computer Vision, Medical AI, Generative AI, and NLP. He designs and deploys end-to-end AI systems, including multi-agent RAG assistants, real-time detection platforms, LLM fine-tuning pipelines, and cloud-ready MLOps/LLMOps workflows.

## Projects

### Agentic AI Research Assistant (Azure)
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/agentic-ai-research-assistant-azure
- Production-ready multi-agent RAG for document-grounded Q&A.
- Session-isolated retrieval, async ingestion, and citation-aware responses.
- Stack: LangGraph, LangChain, FastAPI, React, ChromaDB, Docker, Azure.

### Smart Job Matcher (Neo4j + AI)
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/Smart-Job-Matcher-Neo4j-AI
- Semantic job-candidate matching with graph analytics and LLM integration.
- Stack: Spring Boot, Angular, Neo4j, Groq LLM, D3.js.

### Medical NLP - DDI Relation Extraction
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/DDI-Relation-Extraction-NLP
- Trained/evaluated 30+ deep learning models for drug-drug interaction extraction.
- Stack: BioBERT, BiLSTM, PyTorch, Flask.

### Urban Security - Weapon Detection
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/Weapon_Detection_app
- Real-time YOLOv8 detection system with >30 FPS.
- Metrics: F1-score 0.9960, mAP 0.9612.

### Fine-Tuning Mistral 7B for E-commerce
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/mistral-ecommerce-finetuning
- PEFT/LoRA-based fine-tuning pipeline.
- Metric: 80.36% mean token accuracy.

### AG News MLOps Pipeline (Azure)
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/ag-news-mlops-azure
- End-to-end NLP deployment with CI/CD and Docker on Azure.
- Metric: 91.34% accuracy.

### Image Captioning BLIP Fine-tuning
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/blip-image-captioning-finetune
- Fine-tuned BLIP on Flickr30k (31k+ images).
- Metric: ROUGE 0.4320.

### Alzheimer MRI Classification (XAI + RAG)
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/alzheimer-mri-classification-xai-rag
- Benchmark-beating medical imaging classifier with explainability.

### Hate Speech Detection
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/hate-speech-detection-comparison
- Multi-class toxicity detection with HateBERT and robust evaluation.

### NeuroDerm AI
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/NeuroDerm-AI
- Skin lesion diagnostic system with Grad-CAM explainability.

### Realistic Text-to-Image Generation
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/Realistic-Text-to-Image-Generation
- LoRA fine-tuning and quality evaluation pipeline.

### Text Clustering 20 Newsgroups
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/text-clustering-20newsgroups
- Unsupervised clustering with embeddings and dimensionality reduction.

### PathMNIST XAI Classification
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/pathmnist-xai-classification
- Histopathology classification with explainability tools.

### SDMW-MCP
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/SDMW-MCP
- Spring Boot and Python implementation of Model Context Protocol (MCP).

### Video Violence Detection Web App
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/Video-Violence-Detection-Web-App
- End-to-end violence detection with FastAPI + React.
- Benchmarked VideoMAE, CNN-LSTM, R(2+1)D, YOLO+LSTM.

### DL Face Recognition App
Source: https://github.com/YassirCher/dl-face-recognition-app
- Trained and benchmarked 90 face-recognition model combinations.
- Includes inference and analysis dashboard.

## Education
- Master of Excellence in Data Science & AI, Universite Moulay Ismail, Meknes (2024-2026), currently in S4.
- Bachelor (Licence) in SMI, Universite Moulay Ismail, Meknes (2024), honors: Assez Bien.
- Baccalaureate in Mathematical Sciences A (2020).

## Certifications
- AWS Generative AI Applications
- IBM Machine Learning Professional Certificate
- OCI AI Foundations Associate
- Intermediate Machine Learning

Yassir CHERGUI | Data Science & AI Engineer | Master Student
Meknes, Morocco

Availability: Immediate (Seeking 4-6 month PFE Internship)

Professional Summary
Master's student in Data Science & AI specializing in Computer Vision, Medical AI, Generative AI, and NLP. Focused on bridging advanced research and real-world deployment through scalable MLOps and LLMOps pipelines. Experienced in real-time detection systems, multi-agent RAG, LLM fine-tuning, and full-stack AI product delivery.

Technical Skills
AI & Machine Learning: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn, Hugging Face, NumPy, Pandas.
Deep Learning Architectures: MLP, CNN, RNN, LSTM, GRU, GNN, Autoencoders, Transformers, Encoder-Decoder.
Generative AI & NLP: LLMs (Mistral, Llama, Qwen), Embeddings, RAG, Agentic RAG, LoRA, PEFT, LangChain, LangGraph, Prompt Engineering, Multi-Agent Systems, MCP, LLMOps.
Computer Vision: YOLOv8, OpenCV, Medical Imaging (MRI), Grad-CAM, Video Understanding.
Databases & Data Systems: Neo4j, Cassandra, SQL, ChromaDB, Vector Databases, Semantic Search, Hadoop, Pig, Hive.
Development & MLOps: Python, Django, Flask, FastAPI, Spring Boot, Angular, React, Flutter, Docker, Docker Compose, Nginx, Azure, GitHub Actions, Linux, Git.
Machine Learning Algos: XGBoost, Linear Regression, Logistic Regression, KNN, Decision Tree, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, K-Means, PCA, DBSCAN, HDBSCAN.
Data Science Stack: Matplotlib, Seaborn.

Soft Skills
Strong critical thinking and problem-solving.
Results-driven execution on end-to-end AI projects.
Autonomous delivery and strong collaboration.
Clear technical communication.

Key Projects
Urban Security - Real-time Weapon Detection System (YOLOv8, Django, PyTorch)
- Built an end-to-end real-time detection pipeline achieving >30 FPS.
- Performance: F1-score 0.9960, mAP 0.9612.

Fine-Tuning Mistral 7B (E-commerce Assistant) (LLM, PEFT/LoRA, RAG)
- Built an intelligent assistant with 80.36% mean token accuracy.
- Delivered data preprocessing, vectorization, and multi-label pipeline.

AG News Classification MLOps (Azure, Docker, FastAPI, GitHub Actions)
- Achieved 91.34% accuracy with Linear SVM + TF-IDF.
- Implemented CI/CD and container deployment to Azure Container Instances.

Image Captioning Fine-tuning (BLIP, PyTorch, Transformers)
- Fine-tuned BLIP on Flickr30k (31k+ images), ROUGE score 0.4320.

Alzheimer MRI Classification (TensorFlow, XAI, RAG)
- Built benchmark-beating medical classifier with explainability.

Medical NLP - DDI Relation Extraction (BioBERT, BiLSTM, PyTorch, Flask)
- Trained/evaluated 30+ models on biomedical datasets.
- Delivered real-time inference and model-comparison web dashboard.

Agentic AI Research Assistant (LangGraph, LangChain, FastAPI, ChromaDB, React, Docker, Azure)
- Built production-oriented multi-agent RAG with session-isolated retrieval and citation-grounded responses.
- Implemented asynchronous document ingestion and containerized cloud-ready architecture.
